finding: Document lacks direct evidence of a documented, continuous risk management process covering the full lifecycle.
legal_basis: Article 9 requires a risk management system to be established, implemented, documented and maintained in relation to high-risk AI systems.
llm_recommendation: Provide a detailed, self-contained risk management plan within the document, covering identification, estimation, evaluation, and communication of risks.

finding: Document lacks direct evidence of data governance practices and redirects to external research papers.
evidence: For comprehensive insights into our training and evaluation methodologies, we invite you to explore our research papers.
legal_basis: Article 10 requires training, validation, and testing data sets to be governed with documented practices.
llm_recommendation: Provide self-contained documentation of data governance practices within the document.

finding: Document provides an overview but redirects to external research papers for comprehensive insights.
evidence: This model card is not intended to encompass all of our research. For comprehensive insights into our training and evaluation methodologies, we invite you to explore our research papers.
legal_basis: Article 11 requires technical documentation to be drawn up before the system is placed on the market.

finding: The document provides general descriptions but redirects to external sources for comprehensive insights.

finding: Document lacks explicit documentation of human oversight mechanisms and redirects to external sources.
